line: The one thing that I did know was that Sephiroth was at their final destination.

name: Cloud
line: I wasn't pursuing Sephiroth. I was being summoned by Sephiroth. All the anger and hatred I bore him, made it impossible for me to ever forget him. That and what he gave me.

name: Cloud
line: Sephiroth? Sephiroth? I'm here. And I brought you the Black Materia.

name: Cloud
line: Show yourself to me. Where are you?

name: Cloud
line: Sephiroth... So we finally meet again.

name: Hojo
line: Did you see it!! It's Sephiroth! So he IS here!

name: Hojo
line: This is perfect! Both Jenova's Reunion and Sephiroth's will! They won't be diffused into the Lifestream, but gathered here! Mwa, haa, ha,......

name: Tifa
line: What are you so happy about, Professor? You know what this means, don't you? Cloud has the Black Materia! Sephiroth is going to summon Meteor! Every single person is going to die!

name: Rufus
line: Whatever I say now is too little... too late......We must evacuate.

name: Rufus
line: I want you all to come with me. There is still much more I want to hear.

name: Tifa
line: Cloud...

name: Tifa
line: ......I didn't know what to do. I was always like that...

name: Cloud
line: ohhh...

name: Cloud
line: Ooouugh......

name: Tifa
line: Are you all right?

name: Cloud
line: oo...uh...agh

name: Cloud
line: Uh...uh...Tifa...?

name: Cloud
line: Tifa...?

name: Cloud
line: Tifa!

name: Tifa
line: Oh, Cloud!

name: Cloud
line: That's right. I'm Cloud.

name: Tifa
line: Is it really you, Cloud? I never thought I'd find you here!

name: Cloud
line: Yeah, it's been a while.

name: Tifa
line: What happened to you? You don't look well.

name: Cloud
line: ......Yeah? It's nothing. I'm okay.

name: Tifa
line: How long has it been?

name: Cloud
line: Five years.

name: Cloud
line: What is it?

name: Tifa
line: ...it's really been a long time.

name: Tifa
line: Actually, it's been seven years. You got your wish and joined SOLDIER, quit after the Sephiroth incident, and now you're a  mercenary...

name: Tifa
line: You told me a lot about what happened after you left Nibelheim... But... ...Something's wrong. I felt there was something strange about the things you talked about. All the things you didn't know that you should, And other things you shouldn't know that you did... I wanted to make sure...  But then I heard...you were going far away...

name: Barret
line: Huh?

name: Tifa
line: The glare...

name: Barret
line: You'll be better soon. You've been asleep for a long time.

name: Tifa
line: I'm......hungry...

name: Barret
line: Hey, why don't you ask?

name: Barret
line: About him.

name: Tifa
line: ...Because I'm scared.

name: Barret
line: Don't worry. I don't know what happened to Cloud either.

name: Barret
line: Guess I shouldn't tell you not to worry... None of them know if he's all right either.

name: Tifa
line: He's still...alive, right?

name: Tifa
line: How long...was I asleep?

name: Barret
line: Lessee now...... Must've been about 7 days.

name: Tifa
line: What about Sephiroth?

name: Barret
line: You ain't over it yet. Remember that huge light, in the Northern Cave? Since then, the crater's been surrounded by a huge barrier of light. Everyone knows Sephiroth sleeps in that big hole, protected by the barrier. We can't do a damn thing about it. We just gotta wait till he wakes up.

name: Barret
line: An' on topa that, some huge monster called Weapon's been on a rampage.

name: Tifa
line: ...Weapon?

name: Barret
line: Remember that huge monster that was with Sephiroth, at the bottom of the crater? Well it's up here now. They say it's some legendary monster from the past.

name: Tifa
line: Weapon...is protecting Sephiroth?

name: Barret
line: Dunno. But he's up here goin' around tearin' shit up. Right now Rufus' fightin' it. I hate to say it, but he's got guts.

name: Barret
line: We shoulda been the ones to destroy it, but we ain't got no time...

name: Tifa
line: Time...

name: Tifa
line: ... Hey! How about Meteor?

name: Barret
line: ...Dunno.

name: Rufus
line: I thought Cloud would show up to save you all... Professor Hojo wanted to check up on Cloud, too.

name: Tifa
line: What are you going to do to Cloud?

name: Rufus
line: Sephiroth's alter ego...

name: Rufus
line: Meteor has been summoned... Essentially, it's all but over now. So, there's no need for you now.

name: Rufus
line: No, maybe there is an important task for you...

name: Heidegger
line: President! Preparations for the public execution are complete.

name: Barret
line: Execution!? What're ya gonna get by executin' us?

name: Rufus
line: You are to be executed for causing this situation. People are ignorant. They'll feel better as long as someone is punished.

name: Barret
line: I take back what little praise I had for this damn jackass!

name: Rufus
line: Well, enjoy your last moments together.

name: Heidegger
line: I'll tie your arms now.

name: Barret
line: The hell are these people?

name: Scarlet
line: We will be broadcasting your miserable deaths live on national television.

name: Cait Sith
line: Scarlet, why a public execution in this day and age?

name: Scarlet
line: With the chaos resulting from the Meteor reports, we desperately need to rally public support... it's better that we punish somebody, anybody.

name: Tifa
line: You make me sick...

name: Scarlet
line: Ha, ha, ha, ha ! They'll never admit it, but everyone loves this stuff!

name: Scarlet
line: We'll start with this girl.

name: Barret
line: If you've gotta do it...do me first!

name: Scarlet
line: Camera, this way! Make sure you get this, the audience just eats up tearful goodbyes!

name: Tifa
line: What are you doing!?

name: Scarlet
line: This is my special gas chamber. Take your time, and enjoy a slow painful death.

name: Scarlet
line: Stuck up ^%$#&!!

name: Scarlet
line: Well now, the show's about to begin. Ha, ha, ha !

name: Scarlet
line: Hey, hey, all of you!

name: Scarlet
line: Damn! Why now?

name: Cait Sith
line: How does it feel now, Scarlet?

name: Scarlet
line: Hmm, so you didn't run? I'm impressed. How do I feel? Right now......

name: Scarlet
line: Nngaaaaaahhhh!

name: Barret
line: Huh!? Sleeping gas?

name: Barret
line: Why you......? Ain't you part of Shinra?

name: Cait Sith
line: Let's just say I'm against capital punishment. Besides... I hate this broad. Come on, we gotta help Tifa.

name: Cait Sith
line: I'll keep watch at the entrance.

name: Heidegger
line: It's Weapon.

name: Rufus
line: There's been so many attacks lately. Can we handle it?

name: Heidegger
line: I believe so. Your orders?

name: Rufus
line: No need to ask.

name: Heidegger
line: We'll give it a shot from our big cannon.

name: Heidegger
line: Open cannon doors!! Activate cannon. Target

name: Heidegger
line: The cannon...

name: Rufus
line: Did we get 'em?

name: Heidegger
line: Seems so...

name: Heidegger
line: It can't be! We hit it dead on!

name: Rufus
line: How about the cannon?

name: Heidegger
line: It'll take time to reload.

name: Rufus
line: Then use regular fire power in the mean time!

name: Heidegger
line: Yes sir! Open all artillery doors! Target

name: Heidegger
line: Not good! It's attacking!

name: Tifa
line: Gas!!

name: Tifa
line: Barret, help!!

name: Barret
line: Hold your breath! Hold on as long as you can!

name: Tifa
line: Come on! I can't hold on forever!

name: Barret
line: Shi-!

name: Cait Sith
line: Hmm, we gotta go with a different plan. Let's get out of this room first.

name: Barret
line: Tifa! I'll help you, I promise!

name: Scarlet
line: Fools. Now, you can't save the girl.

name: Scarlet
line: Ha, ha, ha, ha !!

name: Barret
line: Goddammit......!!

name: Cait Sith
line: OK, OK time for Plan B. Let's run to the airport!

name: Barret
line: Why the airport? An' leave Tifa there?

name: Cait Sith
line: Trust me, trust me. We gotta take a chance.

name: Cait Sith
line: Uh oh? Did I make a wrong turn?

name: Barret
line: You damn cat......! What the hell're we gonna do now? They all be comin' soon!

name: Barret
line: Yo, better watch my back till the end...partner!

name: Scarlet
line: What d'you do? Hey! Open it!

name: Tifa
line: First you lock me in this weird place, and now you're telling me to come out? Make up your mind!

name: Scarlet
line: Our little game of hide and seek ends here. The execution may have been unsuccessful, but your death by falling from here and crashing into the water below still might be pretty exciting.

name: Scarlet
line: Stuck up to the end!

name: Tifa
line: Quit slapping me! You old wench!!! (Push the  button!)

name: Scarlet
line: Now it's time to pay up. I'll really drop you if you don't settle down!

name: Scarlet
line: Ha, ha, ha, ha !

name: Barret
line: You okay?

name: Tifa
line: My cheeks hurt a bit.

name: Tifa
line: Forget about that, what's all this about?

name: Cait Sith
line: Well, I'll catch the details later. In any case, the Airship, Highwind, is now yours.

name: Barret
line: I thought...... Tifa was gone for good.

name: Cait Sith
line: Sorry, but I had to do something to trick the enemy.

name: Cait Sith
line: Come on! Everyone is waiting!

name: Tifa
line: Everyone? Everyone's here?

name: Cid
line: What's wrong!? You should be more excited than that!

name: Cid
line: Yeah......

name: Tifa
line: Not enough crew.

name: Cid
line: Hey you! What the hell are you doin'!?

name: Cid
line: Hey you! What the hell are you doin'!?

name: Tifa
line: Meteor is coming, and Weapon is on the rampage...... At a time like this, I don't know what I'm supposed to do......

name: Tifa
line: No idea at all......

name: Barret
line: Get a hold of yourself Tifa! C'mon, let's think about this! No way we can get offa this train we're on!

name: Tifa
line: ......If only Cloud was here, everything would be fine.

name: Tifa
line: Cloud would...... Stand that cocky little way he did, and tell us what to do. He'd say, 'Everything's under control, Tifa.'

name: Barret
line: Tifa! When'd you become such a wimp!

name: Tifa
line: I'm sorry Barret. I'm kind of shocked myself. I'm so depressed.

name: Red XIII
line: And Tifa......the reason why we all thought it was Cloud was because......

name: Tifa
line: ......I know. That's why I want to make sure. That's why I have to see him again.

name: Cid
line: Gotta admit he was a strange dude. Just when you thought he was cool, he'd go and do some damn fool thing. And when you thought he was smart, he'd show how stupid he was.

name: Cid
line: Everything about him from his movements to his speech were kinda odd. Knowin' what I do now, I can see why he was that way. Well, as long as you stay alive, you just might see him again someday, so cheer up, sis.

name: Tifa
line: ......I'll be able to see him someday.

name: Cid
line: If we can find out where he is, the Highwind'll get us there in no time.

name: Red XIII
line: ......Maybe

name: Red XIII
line: Cloud is still stuck deep in the North Crater, where the ground cracked and swallowed him up...... Buried in the depths of the underground......

name: Tifa
line: Deep within the earth......are you talking about the Lifestream?

name: Red XIII
line: The Lifestream sometimes gushes out to the surface from cracks in the ocean floor. I heard that such a place exists. Maybe, just maybe Cloud's......

name: Cid
line: Tifa, sorry, but I've gotta show this moron how to land the ship. Don't worry, it'll be done in a minute.

name: Cid
line: Oh, and Tifa...... No matter what your goal is, you've got to be prepared. Go to your room and get ready for our operation.

name: Yuffie
line: Well......I'm glad you're safe.

name: Yuffie
line: I'm going to stay up here a little longer.

name: Tifa
line: You got lost didn't you? Separated from someone you love......? Silly thing...

name: Tifa
line: Wha!?

name: Tifa
line: Wh......wait a minute!! What did you just say!?

name: Tifa
line: Excuse me! That person you were just talking about......

name: Tifa
line: Cloud!! It must be!! It's Cloud!!

name: Tifa
line: So where is he? Is he safe!? Where is he now......?

name: Tifa
line: He's alive...! Cloud...... Cloud's alive!!

name: Tifa
line: Cloud!?

name: Doctor
line: Here now. The way you're running around here, you'd think Meteor fell or something.

name: Tifa
line: I'm sorry, but I heard that a friend of mine was being taken care of here......

name: Doctor
line: A friend...?

name: Doctor
line: Oh yeah......! That young fellow!? Don't worry. Your friend is next door. But I'm afraid his condition is...

name: Tifa
line: Here?

name: Tifa
line: Over here.

name: Tifa
line: Cloud...!?

name: Tifa
line: Oh...Cloud!! I'm so glad you're safe!?

name: Tifa
line: Cloud......?

name: Tifa
line: Wh......what's wrong...... Cloud......?

name: Tifa
line: Cloud! What happened to you......!?

name: Doctor
line: Mako poisoning...... Quite an advanced case...... It appears this young man's been exposed to a high level of Mako energy for a protracted period of time. He probably has no idea who or where he is now...... Poor fellow, his voice doesn't even work. He is literally miles away from us. Some place far away where no one's ever been... All alone......

name: Tifa
line: Doctor......!!

name: Tifa
line: Cloud.......

name: Doctor
line: Ahem! Let us excuse ourselves.

name: Doctor
line: Listen, would you all mind...... waiting outside?

name: Tifa
line: Why......? What do you want me to do?

name: Tifa
line: Please, Cloud...... Talk to me....... Tell me you see me, that you can hear me...... Tell me, please......

name: Tifa
line: I came this far believing in the memories we have together... This isn't happening......! This is too cruel......

name: Doctor
line: I'll say it again, he's got Mako poisoning. I've never seen a case this bad... An immense amount of Mako-drenched knowledge was put into his brain all at once...... No normal human could have survived it......It's a miracle he did!

name: Doctor
line: But remember, the light of hope can be found anywhere. Listen, if you give up hope... What will happen to him?

name: Tifa
line: Yes...... I'm sorry I had you all worried. And I have something I want to tell you all......

name: Tifa
line: I don't care about anything else, only Cloud...... I......want to be by his side......

name: Tifa
line: I'm sorry, everyone... At a time like this......

name: Tifa
line: Right......

name: Barret
line: What're we gonna do now! What can WE do?

name: Barret
line: Huh? Ain't there nothin' we can do? An' don' go tellin' us to wait for Cloud to get better.

name: Cait Sith
line: Oh, I've got some news.

name: Barret
line: Yeah, what!? That you a spy?

name: Cait Sith
line: Yeah...... I've already told you I was.

name: Cait Sith
line: Both gya ha ha and Kya ha ha , are up to something. Wanna eavesdrop?

name: Heidegger
line: Gya haah hah hah! We already solved the first problem! Meteor will soon be smashed to bits! The plan has already been put in motion. Namely, to collect Huge Materia from each region.

name: Rufus
line: Well......

name: Scarlet
line: Huge Materia is a high density special type of materia made through a special compression process in Mako reactors. The energy extracted from it is 330 times the strength of normal materia. Ha, ha, ha! How about that!? We will gather all the Huge Materia together and ram it into Meteor. That will cause a huge explosion!! Reducing Meteor literally to bits.

name: Rufus
line: You're going to ram Meteor? Do you think we have the technology to do it?

name: Scarlet
line: Don't worry about that! More importantly, we've got to collect Huge Materia from each area.

name: Heidegger
line: We've already collected materia from Nibelheim. All that's left is "Corel" and "Fort Condor". I've already dispatched troops to Corel. Ghaa haah hah hah!

name: Red XIII
line: And the Huge Materia...... You mean the Huge Materia, don't you? I've heard about it. When, our small materia nears the larger one, something should happen. I'm certain of it. That's why we're using the power of materia in our fight......

name: Barret
line: Can't let Shinra get a hold of the Huge Materia!

name: Barret
line: Besides, when Cloud gets back, I wanna show him this Huge Materia. He's gonna be shocked.

name: Cait Sith
line: So, what are you saying, Barret? Even though you're always knocking him, you really want Cloud to return.

name: Barret
line: I ain't sayin' nothin' 'bout nothin'. You just...shut your face!

name: Barret
line: Every group's gotta have a leader. An' that's me! Or at least I wanna be... But I ain't cut out to be no leader. I never knew that till lately.

name: Barret
line: An' that's what is......

name: Cid
line: Wha? What's goin' on?

name: Barret
line: You been chosen to be the new leader.

name: Cid
line: Pain in the ass. Forget it.

name: Barret
line: But for us to fight, we gotta have Highwind, and you. We need it to save the Planet. An' who's runnin' this ship? You! That's why you're our new leader. Ain't no one else can.

name: Cid
line: Hm......this ship's gonna save the Planet, huh? Ain't that gonna be just a little tough?

name: Cid
line: Oh man, that went straight to my heart. I'm a man, too! Okay, I'll do it! Everyone, follow me!

name: Barret
line: Awright, now here's the first job. The Operation Room's waiting for you!

name: Cid
line: Yeah!!

name: Cid
line: What the hell did we fight for?

name: Cid
line: Just forget about it. Anyway, we're still alive.

name: Cid
line: But ya know, Shinra's probably on high alert since we always mess with 'em. How 'bout we take a break and go see that little fella for a bit?

name: Cid
line: Yeah, I'm worried 'bout Tifa; she may've collapsed takin' care of the guy.

name: Cid
line: This ain't no joke, Jack.

name: Cid
line: Yeah, but ever since we got in their way the last time, they should've gotten a little more cautious. I doubt they'll fly right into action. I'm more concerned about him that anything else.

name: Cid
line: Yeah, and I'm worried that even Tifa's gonna fall over on her butt. Let's go back and see what's happening?...... to Mideel...

name: Cid
line: Looks like they're takin' off with the Huge Materia in that train!

name: Cid
line: Hey, do you know who I am? I'm Cid - that's who the hell I am! Now just let me handle it!

name: Cid
line: Hey, hey, hey, hey---!

name: Cid
line: Don't ask me... I don't know!

name: Cid
line: Don't worry! I can handle this kinda stuff! Two levers; one on the right and one on the left...

name: Cid
line: I see, just alternate the two levers up and down, right!? Judging from the enemy's speed, I'd say it'll take about 10 minutes. We're gonna fly!! Hold on tight!!

name: Cid
line: All right--- Just hand over the Huge Materia!

name: Cid
line: I KNOW, already! Just shut up and keep quiet! If we keep this up, we'll crash right into North Corel!

name: Cid
line: Let's see... If we alternately use the levers to accelerate,...

name: Cid
line: It should brake if we move the levers up or down simultaneously!

name: Cid
line: ^%#@! The other way!? Just watch, this time, I'll...

name: Cid
line: With us always in their face, even the Shinra's gotta be getting tired of it all.

name: Cid
line: We have to hurry that much... ...right now I'm more worried about him than anything else!

name: Cid
line: Yeah, and I'm worried about Tifa, too. Let's go see what's going on at Mideel...

name: Cid
line: Oh ^%$#&$! We're gonna crash into North Corel!

name: Cid
line: Even if they are the Shinra, they should have a hard time with us getting in their way. I don't think we have to hurry that much... ...I just can't get that guy out of my head.

name: Cid
line: Yeah, and I'm worried about Tifa, too. Let's go see what's going on at Mideel...

name: Cid
line: DAMN! Sorry! I couldn't catch up to them!

name: Cid
line: Sorry... I never shoulda gave that Huge Materia to the Shinra so easily...

name: Cid
line: With us always in their face, even the Shinra's gotta be getting tired of it all.

name: Cid
line: We have to hurry that much... ...right now I'm more worried about him than anything else!

name: Cid
line: Yeah, and I'm worried about Tifa, too. Let's go see what's going on at Mideel...

name: Cid
line: Cloud did a great job. Sheesh...... Shall we go to Mideel to check on things?

name: Tifa
line: Eyaaah!?

name: Cid
line: What did you say, Cloud!?

name: Cid
line: Damn. What the hell's goin' on!?

name: Cid
line: The Lifestream is gushing up from below the surface of the earth!

name: Cid
line: Damn, that's......!? This is bad......!!

name: Tifa
line: Cid......!? What's wrong?

name: Cid
line: N, nothin'!! You and Cloud get inside quick!!

name: Cid
line: Hey, don't worry about a thing. I ain't about to die that easily.

name: Tifa
line: Be careful...!

name: Cid
line: Okay, here I go! Watch this!!

name: Cid
line: Damn!! That &%$^%$ Weapon!! Of all the times to show up......!

name: Cid
line: OK then, come on!! You &$^%$!

name: Cid
line: Damn, you gotta be kiddin'......!!

name: Cid
line: Th, this's bad......! The main stream is kickin' up!! Somethin' way bigger than that last one is on its way!!

name: Cid
line: No good!! Get outta here......!!

name: Cid
line: Goddammit!! You don't have time to worry about anyone other than yourself! You don't know when that stream'll blow......

name: Cid
line: Whoa!!

name: Cid
line: There's no time, hurry!!

name: Cid
line: Tifa!! Cloud!! Get outta here!!

name: Tifa
line: This is bad...... The tremors are getting worse.

name: Tifa
line: Wait a minute, Cloud.

name: Tifa
line: Doctor! Shouldn't we move him somewhere rather than stay here...?

name: Doctor
line: Hmm...... It might be safer to take refuge in a wide open space.

name: Tifa
line: Don't you worry about a thing, Cloud...... I'll see to it that you get somewhere safe!

name: Doctor
line: No! The structure can't take it!! Hurry!

name: Tifa
line: Yes!

name: Tifa
line: Ready Cloud? We're leaving now!!

name: Tifa
line: Where's Cloud......!? Cloud,where are you!?

name: Tifa
line: Who is it......? I can't hear......

name: Tifa
line: Wait a minute......! I don't know anything about that!

name: Tifa
line: No! It's not me......! I'd never do anything like that!!

name: Tifa
line: No! Stop it......!! Stay back!

name: Tifa
line: Somebody......help! Please!!

name: Tifa
line: Cloud,help me!!

name: Tifa
line: Eyaaaaghh......!!

name: Tifa
line: Cloud!?

name: Tifa
line: What is it, Cloud? What is this......!? Is this the inside of your dreams? Or is it...... your......subconsciousness......?

name: Tifa
line: You're searching, aren't you Cloud? Searching......for yourself......

name: Tifa
line: I can help too. We'll work together to try and get the real you back!

name: Tifa
line: But...... Where do we start......?

name: Tifa
line: It connects....... to Nibelheim......?

name: Tifa
line: That's right... It's probably best to start from there......

name: Tifa
line: Cloud...look.

name: Tifa
line: Here's the well...

name: Tifa
line: And that's Gramps' Inn, too.

name: Tifa
line: The only truck in town. It's been here since we were little kids, right?

name: Tifa
line: This is the Nibelheim you remember, right? It's the same as my Nibelheim. That's why this place is......our Nibelheim.

name: Sephiroth
line: How does it feel?

name: Tifa
line: Five Years ago...I saw the real Sephiroth for the very first time.

name: Sephiroth
line: It's your first time back to your hometown in a long time, right?

name: Sephiroth
line:
So how does it feel?
I wouldn't know because I don't have a hometown...

name: Cloud
line: Ummm...how 'bout your parents?

name: Tifa
line: So this is...the Great Sephiroth.

name: Sephiroth
line: My mother is Jenova. She died right after she gave birth to me. My father...

name: Tifa
line: But to tell you the truth, I thought he was very cold.

name: Sephiroth
line: What does it matter...?

name: Sephiroth
line: All right, let's go.

name: Tifa
line: I remember, I felt a foreboding about him.

name: Tifa
line: No, Cloud. I've been hiding it for some time, afraid that if I told you ...something terrible might happen. But, I'm not going to hide anything anymore.

name: Tifa
line: You weren't here. Cloud did not come to Nibelheim five years ago.

name: Tifa
line: I...waited. But, Cloud...never came. The two that were ordered here were Sephiroth and another person...

name: Sephiroth
line: All right, let's go.

name: Cloud
line: You mean that member of SOLDIER who came with Sephiroth wasn't......Cloud......?

name: Tifa
line: There's nothing...... I can say...... You must find the answer yourself...... If you can't...... Then you......

name: Tifa
line: Take your time, Cloud. Slowly......little by little, okay?

name: Tifa
line: Don't hurry, Cloud...... Don't answer too quickly. Just keep checking all those small emotions and it'll come back...... Slowly......little by little......

name: Tifa
line: Right...like the sky that night...... the heavens were filled with stars......

name: Tifa
line: From the beginning...OK?

name: Tifa
line: Try and remember, Cloud.

name: Tifa
line: Right, I was wearing these clothes.

name: Tifa
line: That's you, too. You were so small then......  ...and cute.

name: Tifa
line: Sephiroth once said... Cloud made up his memories by listening to my stories... Did you imagine this sky? No, you remembered it.

name: Tifa
line: That night the stars were gorgeous. It was just Cloud and I. We talked at the well... That's why I continued to believe that you were the real Cloud.

name: Tifa
line: I still believe you're the Cloud from Nibelheim... But you don't believe in yourself... These memories aren't enough.

name: Tifa
line: Cloud, what about your other memories?

name: Tifa
line: No, not memories. A memory is something that has to be consciously recalled, right? That's why sometimes it can be mistaken and a different thing......

name: Tifa
line: But it's different from a memory locked deep within your heart...... That's why it must be a fake. If he could recall up that memory......

name: Tifa
line: That's it! What about some memory that has to do with me? I say something and you don't remember it...... But you say something, and I remember it, too... Then we'll know that's our memory......

name: Tifa
line: Talk to me. About anything, some important memory to you...

name: Tifa
line: Now that you mention it, why did you want to join SOLDIER in the first place? I always thought it was a sudden decision you made......

name: Cloud
line: ......I was devastated. ......I wanted to be noticed.

name: Cloud
line: I thought if I got stronger I could get someone to notice......

name: Tifa
line: Someone to notice you...? ......who?

name: Cloud
line: Who......? ......You know who! ......You, that's who.

name: Cloud
line: Tifa......did you forget...... about those days?

name: Tifa
line: Look......I...... I'm sorry...... But what are you talking about?

name: Cloud
line: No......it's all right. You were having a hard time back then. You were so busy with your own things, it's only natural you don't remember me back then.

name: Tifa
line: 'Back then'?

name: Cloud
line: It's important to me...... I hate to say it but... It's a very important memory...... Do you want to see it?

name: Tifa
line: My room?

name: Cloud
line: It was my first time there.

name: Tifa
line: Was...it?

name: Cloud
line: I only used to look up at it from outside.

name: Tifa
line: Was that the first day you came into my room?

name: Tifa
line: ...that's right. We lived next to each other. But I really didn't know you that well.

name: Tifa
line: I've known you since we were children and always thought we were close...

name: Tifa
line: Now that you mention it...I don't recall you ever being in my room...

name: Cloud
line: Tifa always used to be with this three-some.

name: Tifa
line: ...That's right.

name: Cloud
line: I used to think...they were all stupid.

name: Tifa
line: What!?

name: Cloud
line: You were all childish, laughing at every little stupid thing.

name: Tifa
line: But we were children, back then.

name: Cloud
line: ...I know. I'm the one that was stupid. I really wanted to play with everyone, but I was never allowed into the group.

name: Cloud
line: Then later... I began to think I was different... That I was different from those immature kids. That then...maybe...

name: Cloud
line: Just maybe, they would invite me in. I thought that might happen, so I hung around...

name: Cloud
line: I was so prejudiced. And...weak.

name: Cloud
line: That night I called Tifa out to the well... I thought to myself Tifa would never come...that she hated me.

name: Tifa
line: Yeah...it was so sudden. I was...a bit surprised.

name: Tifa
line: But... It's true that we weren't THAT close, but... After you left town, I really thought about you a lot. I used to wonder how Cloud was doing. I wonder if Cloud was able to get into SOLDIER? I started reading the newspapers, thinking that there might be an article about you.

name: Cloud
line: Thanks, Tifa. Tell him what you told me, later. He'll probably be so happy.

name: Tifa
line: OK!

name: Tifa
line:
Huh? What happened on this day? Was it a special day?
This was the day...

name: Cloud
line: Tifa's mother...

name: Tifa
line: The day Mom died...

name: Tifa
line: I want...to see...mom...

name: Tifa
line: ...I wonder if there's anything beyond that mountain?

name: Tifa
line: How 'bout those that died? Did mama pass through the mountains?

name: Cloud
line: Tifa was in a coma for seven days. We all thought she wouldn't make it. If only I could've saved her... I was so angry... Angry at myself for my weakness.

name: Cloud
line: Ever since then, I felt Tifa blamed me... I got out of control... I'd get into fights not even caring who it was.

name: Cloud
line: That was the first time I heard about Sephiroth. If I got strong like Sephiroth, then everyone might...

name: Cloud
line: If I could just get stronger...... Then even Tifa would have to notice me......

name: Tifa
line: So that was it......

name: Tifa
line: Sorry, Cloud. If I had only remembered more clearly what happened, I could have done something sooner......

name: Cloud
line: It's not your fault, Tifa.

name: Tifa
line: But, I remember back when we were eight!

name: Tifa
line:
That's it! Now I know! You weren't created five years ago.
My childhood memories weren't all made up!

name: Tifa
line: Hang in there Cloud! Just a little longer! You've almost found the real you!

name: Tifa
line: Let's go back to Nibelheim again......!

name: Cloud
line: ......The reactor......?

name: Cloud
line: To the reactor! The Mako reactor of five years ago!

name: Tifa
line: Hey! It's Cloud!

name: Tifa
line: You remembered!!

name: Tifa
line: That's right! It was Zack who came to Nibelheim with Sephiroth!

name: Tifa
line: Then, where were you, Cloud?

name: Tifa
line: Cloud... Did you...see it all?

name: Cloud
line: I saw...everything...

name: Sephiroth
line: Aaarrrgh......who...who are you?

name: Cloud
line: Mom... Tifa......my town...give it back...

name: Cloud
line: I had so much respect for you... I admired you...

name: Tifa
line: Cloud!?

name: Tifa
line: That's what happened...

name: Tifa
line: ...You were there. You were watching me.

name: Tifa
line: Yeah, I remember.

name: Tifa
line: Hmm...so it was you.

name: Tifa
line: Better take real good care of me then!

name: Zack
line: Hey Cloud. If you're feeling sick, why don't you take that mask off?

name: Cloud
line: Yeah......

name: Cloud
line: Yeah...this is...me. I...never made it as a member of SOLDIER. I even left my hometown telling everyone I was going to join, but... I was so embarrassed...... I didn't want to see anybody...

name: Sephiroth
line: How does it feel?

name: Sephiroth
line: It's your first time back to your hometown in a long time, right?

name: Tifa
line: ...You came. ...You kept your promise. So you really did come when I was in trouble!

name: Cloud
line: Sorry... I didn't get there...fast enough...

name: Tifa
line: It's all right...Cloud.

name: Sephiroth
line: Just like you.

name: Zack
line: Cloud... Kill Sephiroth...

name: Cloud
line: Sephiroth!!

name: Sephiroth
line: Don't...push...your luck...

name: Sephiroth
line: ...It can't be!

name: Tifa
line: Cloud......

name: Cloud
line: Then...this is goodbye, Tifa. Until we meet again......

name: Tifa
line: Oh, Cloud......! It's really you, isn't it?

name: Cloud
line: Yeah...... Tifa...... We finally......meet again......

name: Tifa
line: You stupid jerk!! You had us all worried sick!!

name: Tifa
line: Cloud!? Are you all right!?

name: Cloud
line: V, voice...... Their......

name: Tifa
line: I see. We're... in the Lifestream aren't we?

name: Tifa
line: Everyone's waiting. Let's go back, Cloud. Back to everyone......

name: Cloud
line: Yeah, I guess so... Come on, Tifa. Let's go home......

name: Tifa
line: Barret... You came back. I...... Cloud... Where is he?

name: Barret
line: Don't worry about him. He's a tough one.

name: Tifa
line: Barret......I...... When I was in the Lifestream I saw the real Cloud. I mean, I didn't really find him. Cloud found himself on his own...

name: Barret
line: Awright, I know... I shouldn't have doubted him. But I can't win against you. You're some kinda lady.

name: Tifa
line: People have so many things pent up inside of themselves... And they can forget so many things...... Strange......isn't it....... .........

name: Barret
line: Yo, Tifa! Snap outta it!!

name: Red XIII
line: Don't say anything, Cloud. All you've been doing is apologizing.

name: Cloud
line: I never was in SOLDIER. I made up the stories about what happened to me five years ago, about being in SOLDIER. I left my village looking for glory, but never made it in to SOLDIER...... I was so ashamed of being so weak; then I heard this story from my friend Zack... And I created an illusion of myself made up of what I had seen in my life...... And I continued to play the charade as if it were true.

name: Barret
line: Illusion, huh...? Pretty damn strong for a 'lusion, I'd say.

name: Cloud
line: I'm physically built like someone in SOLDIER. Hojo's plan to clone Sephiroth wasn't that difficult. It was just the same procedure they use when creating members of SOLDIER.

name: Cloud
line: You see, someone in SOLDIER isn't simply exposed to Mako energy. Their bodies are actually injected with Jenova cells......

name: Cloud
line: For better or worse, only the strong can enter SOLDIER. It has nothing to do with the Jenova Reunion. But weak people......like me, get lost in the whole thing.

name: Cloud
line: The combination of Jenova cells, Sephiroth's strong will, and my own weakness are what created me. Everyone knew that. I'm......Cloud.

name: Cloud
line: ......the master of my own illusionary world. But I can't remain trapped in an illusion any more...... I'm going to live my life without pretending.

name: Tifa
line: You're sure messed up, Cloud!

name: Barret
line: That means there ain't no difference from before!

name: Cait Sith
line: By the way, Cloud. What are you going to do now? Don't tell me you're going to leave the ship?

name: Cloud
line: ......I'm the reason why Meteor is falling towards us. That's why I have to do everything in my power to fight this thing.

name: Barret
line: Good!! Then you're gonna keep fightin' to save the planet!?

name: Cloud
line: It's like you always told me, Barret.

name: Barret
line: Oh, uh, you mean that!

name: Red XIII
line: What? I don't understand!

name: Cloud
line: There ain't no gettin' offa this train we on!

name: Barret
line: There ain't no gettin' offa this train we on!

name: Tifa
line: The train we on don't make no stops!

name: Tifa
line: Let's do it, Cloud!

name: Cait Sith
line: I know this's kinda outta the blue, but there's a underwater reactor at Junon. As far as I can see, that's the only one left. That's that. Let's go!

name: Cloud
line: ......I really do understand, Yuffie. When I get sick on a flight, it's a real killer. When I was in SOLDIER, I completely forgot about my motion sickness.

name: Yuffie
line: Oh...... Isn't there any way to prevent this?

name: Cloud
line: Well, according to my research...... First off, if you're nervous a lot, you won't get sick. But you can't always be nervous.

name: Cloud
line: With this much space, your best bet is to move around while you're riding. It also might be a good idea to stretch sometimes, too.

name: Cloud
line: But in SOLDIER, we spent a lot of time in trucks. That sucked!...... And there's one thing you mustn't do when riding. And that is......

name: Cloud
line: Read!

name: Cloud
line: Once you get sick, there's nothing anyone can do. I know it's tough......

name: Yuffie
line: ......so you're a little better off than me. But I don't feel......well.

name: Yuffie
line: ......Urk...... ......I'm not down yet.

name: Reno
line: Cloud!?

name: Cloud
line: Either give it to us or else. ...which is it gonna be?

name: Reno
line: Unfortunately, I don't have time to deal with you. My priority is the Huge Materia!

name: Barret
line: Damn, man!! ......what the...? Hey yo! Remember I was the leader first, man!

name: Barret
line: Yo! We come a long ways since we got on that train! Lotsa things changed! This and that.

name: Cloud
line: Hmmmm...

name: Cloud
line: Someone...please. I'm sorry I can't take it anymore The lack of space, the shaking, the roar of the engine...

name: Cloud
line: Hey, you're right... I DO feel a little better driving. No sweat. Just leave everything to me.

name: Cloud
line: Phew--! We did it!! The Huge Materia should be at the bottom of the sea by now. Let's continue the search...

name: Cloud
line: Hmm...? ...Must be from Shinra.

name: Cloud
line: All right, I'll do it.

name: Cloud
line: This is Shinra No. 2... Everything's normal.

name: Cloud
line: Junon Airport... We should make it if we hurry.

name: Cloud
line: Forget about the Huge Materia for now. We're climbing!

name: Cloud
line: Damn......makes me sick just thinking about it...

name: Cloud
line: ...Phew... That's good to hear.

name: Cloud
line: We're gettin' outta here!

name: Cloud
line: Hear that? Junon Airport! We can still get the Huge Materia back! Let's hurry!

name: Cloud
line: We're breakin' out of here!

name: Cloud
line: We're gonna hop on a torpedo and blast outta here!

name: Cloud
line: Don't worry! I won't miss! We don't even have a target. We're just aiming for the sky.

name: Cloud
line: Hmm... Junon. I'd love to get my hands on a submarine right now.

name: Cloud
line: Let's go...

name: Cloud
line: We'll hide it somewhere secluded.

name: Cloud
line: Rocket Town, of course.

name: Rude
line: ...We will eliminate everyone who gets in Shinra's way.

name: Cloud
line: Too bad. Those guys are over there.

name: Cid
line: Huh? What are you talkin' 'bout?

name: Cloud
line: Wait a minute!

name: Cid
line: Shut up!! Just shut the hell up!

name: Cid
line: How's the rocket?

name: Cid
line: Broken? How's the repair goin'?

name: Cid
line: Oh great! What a buncha wizards you guys are! She's gonna take a 100 years!

name: Cid
line: I'll take over, so don't worry about the Auto-Pilot!  Hey, go ahead! Go tell everyone!

name: Cloud
line: Hey, Cid! What're you doing!?

name: Cloud
line: There are generations of knowledge and wisdom inside the Materia. We're gonna borrow their powers and save the planet from Sephiroth. There's no way that we can lose the Huge Materia. You understand that, right?

name: Cid
line: Yeah, I understand. I understand that Materia is precious, and I also understand what you're thinking. But listen. I don't give a rat's ass whether it's science or magical power.

name: Cid
line: No, I guess if I had to choose, I'd rather put my money on the power of science. Humans who used to only roam around on the ground are able to fly now! And finally, we're about to go into outer space.

name: Cid
line: Science is a "Power" created and developed by humans. And science just might be what saves this planet. I was able to earn my living thanks to science. So to me, there's nothing greater!

name: Cid
line: Now quit your worrying 'bout what Shinra's gonna do! I don't want to regret not having done something later.

name: Cloud
line: But, Cid......

name: Cid
line: Shut the hell up!! I don't wanna hear it!!

name: Cid
line: Alright, time to get to work! Anyone who ain't involved, get the hell outta here!

name: Cid
line: What the hell......? What the hell happened!?

name: Palmer
line: Hey-hey!

name: Cid
line: Palmer! What the hell did'ya do!?

name: Palmer
line: They said they finished repairing the Auto-Pilot. So, I laun---ched it!

name: Cid
line: Goddamn Shera! Why'd she pick today to get fast!

name: Cid
line: DAMN! Won't even budge! It's completely locked up!

name: Palmer
line: Hey-hey-hey! Almost lift off!

name: Cid
line: What the!? No countdown!? It just don't seem the same without it!

name: Palmer
line: Hey!!!! Hey-hey!!! Blast-----off!

name: Cid
line: Let's see, how's the course set...?

name: Cid
line: Yup, it's headed for a collision with Meteor.

name: Cid
line: That damn Palmer went outta his way to lock the Auto-Pilot device. We might not be able to change the course.

name: Cloud
line: ...this is the end?

name: Cid
line: Huh? What the hell're you sayin'? You're still young, and you give up that easily?

name: Cid
line: I'm not gonna crash into Meteor.

name: Cid
line: Just watch.

name: Cid
line: I keep an Escape Pod on the rocket just for emergencies like this.

name: Cid
line: I deciphered the lock code on the Escape Pod. We'll bail right before we crash into Meteor.

name: Cid
line: If you want the Materia, do whatever you want! The Materia should be there after you climb that ladder.

name: Cloud
line: ...You sure?

name: Cid
line: I dunno... I know what I said a minute ago. But maybe all that I really wanted was just to go into outer space. So, why don't you all do whatever you think is right?

name: Cloud
line: Cid!!

name: Cid
line: Don't worry 'bout me. Hurry up and go! If you don't hurry, the rocket's gonna crash into Meteor!

name: Cloud
line: ...I can't go without my friends.

name: Cid
line: You ^%#@&%......! No time to worry 'bout other people!

name: Cloud
line: I'm gonna do whatever I can.

name: Cid
line: You're stupid. You're really $#&^%$* stupid.

name: Cid
line: Tank Number 8 blew up...... So Tank Number 8... really was malfunctioning......

name: Cid
line: Shera... You were right.  But, ......this is the end for me.

name: Shera
line: Don't say that, Cid.

name: Cid
line: Huh!? Shera!?

name: Shera
line: I tagged along. I'm coming to help you.

name: Cid
line: You stupid &$#&%*%&%#!!

name: Cid
line: ... ... Sorry.

name: Shera
line: The Escape Pod is this way. Please hurry.

name: Cid
line: Hey, Shera! Does this Pod really fly?

name: Shera
line: It'll be OK. I've been checking it till now.

name: Cid
line: ......... Then I'm relieved.

name: Cid
line: So this is......outer space...

name: Cid
line: Man...it's the real thing... I'm really here in outer space...

name: Cid
line: So long, Shinra No.26...

name: Barret
line: What a bust... But I kinda hoped it'd work.

name: Cait Sith
line: We been botherin' them as much as we can... But there ain't no other way... Wonder if we've been wrong all this time?

name: Red XIII
line: Makes you worry, doesn't it?

name: Tifa
line: Don't worry! Think!

name: Cid
line: Hey! The girl's right. You start worryin' and there's no stoppin' it! Things just start fallin' apart and get worse and worse.

name: Barret
line: You're pretty damn optimistic ! You up to somethin'?

name: Cid
line: Yeah, I been thinkin' about this and that. All the time we been up here lookin' at the planet. I been thinkin' even when we were floatin' in the ocean in that escape pod.

name: Cloud
line: I've...been thinking too. About the universe...planet...ocean. How wide and big... No matter where I go and what I do it won't change a thing.

name: Cid
line: Maybe you're right. But I came up with something different. I always thought this planet was so huge. But lookin' at it from space, I realized it's so small. We're just floatin' in the dark. ......kind of makes you feel powerless. On top of that it's got Sephiroth festerin' inside it like a sickness.

name: Cid
line: That's why I say this planet's still a kid. A little kid sick and trembling in the middle of this huge universe. Someone's gotta protect it. Ya follow me? That someone is us.

name: Tifa
line: Cid...that's beautiful.

name: Barret
line: Yo! Cid! You even got to me!

name: Barret
line: Do, now what? How're we gonna protect the planet from Meteor?

name: Cid
line: ...............I'm still thinkin' about that.

name: Red XIII
line: Huh!?

name: Red XIII
line: Did you......hear something?

name: Tifa
line: The planet's scream......or Meteor...? Is it this planet?

name: Cloud
line: Hey, how do we know that this is really the planet's scream?

name: Tifa
line: Did you forget? Bugenhagen told us.

name: Cloud
line: Bugenhagen...

name: Red XIII
line: Let's go see Grandfather! To Cosmo Canyon! I'm sure he'll be able to tell us something that will be helpful!

name: Cloud
line: Yeah, that's why we came.

name: Bugenhagen
line: What to do? Have you lost your way? When that happens we each have to take a good long look at ourselves. There's always something in the deepest reaches of our hearts. Something buried, or something forgotten. Remember it... Whatever that is, must certainly be what you are all looking for...

name: Cloud
line: That's easy enough to say... But, I can't remember a thing.

name: Bugenhagen
line: It must be there. Look harder!

name: Bugenhagen
line: Do you see it? What is it that you are searching for?

name: Cait Sith
line: Nope. Not a thing. Naw. Can't come up with a thing.

name: Cloud
line: I remember Aeris a lot. No...not that. You haven't remembered. You haven't forgotten. That's not it... How would you say it... Aeris was right there all along. Right by our side. She was so close, we couldn't see her. What Aeris did... The words she left behind...

name: Tifa
line: That reminds me... I was the same.

name: Red XIII
line: ......as was I.

name: Barret
line: Me too...

name: Cloud
line: She said she was the only one who could stop Sephiroth's Meteor.

name: Tifa
line: But Aeris is gone.

name: Red XIII
line: Is it impossible for us to carry on... what Aeris tried to accomplish?

name: Barret
line: We ain't no Ancients, if that's what ya mean.

name: Cid
line: What, did that girl go off to that place?

name: Cloud
line: That's it!!

name: Cid
line: What's it?

name: Cloud
line: We don't know about it. What did Aeris know? Why did she face Sephiroth without running away?

name: Red XIII
line: I see... She returned there once again, correct?

name: Bugenhagen
line: Hmmm. Perhaps I'll have you take me there.

name: Red XIII
line: You're going too?

name: Bugenhagen
line: What's so surprising about that...? Even I want to get out from time to time and see the outside world. I wonder what did it? I haven't felt like this in ages.

name: Red XIII
line: It must be the planet. The planet is calling you!

name: Cid
line: Yeah, hoo boy, the planet calling...right.

name: Bugenhagen
line: Ho Ho Hoooo. Then let's go.

name: Bugenhagen
line:
Smells like machinery. I love this smell.
Of course, I also love the smell of nature, too......

name: Bugenhagen
line: Hm? Is the deck up there?

name: Bugenhagen
line: Then I'll be on the deck just passing the time. I can feel the workings of the planet in the smell of the wind. I also feel the greatness of man's wisdom and the knowledge in the smell of machinery... Well, bye for now.

name: Cloud
line: I'm sure she wanted to give her life for the planet...

name: Tifa
line: Really? I wonder? I don't think that's it at all. I think she didn't think she would die at all, but that she planned on coming back all along. She always used to talk about the 'Next time'. She talked about the future more than any of us...

name: Bugenhagen
line: Yes......exactly...

name: Cloud
line: Are you getting something?

name: Bugenhagen
line: ...give me a moment.

name: Cloud
line: Holy?

name: Bugenhagen
line: Holy...the ultimate White Magic. Magic that might stand against Meteor. Perhaps our last hope to save the planet from Meteor. If a soul seeking Holy reaches the planet, it will appear. Ho Ho Hooo. Meteor, Weapon, everything will disappear. Perhaps, even ourselves.

name: Cloud
line: Even us!?

name: Bugenhagen
line: It is up to the planet to decide. What is best for the planet. What is bad for the planet. All that is bad will disappear. That is all.

name: Bugenhagen
line: Ho Ho Hooo. I wonder which we humans are?

name: Cloud
line: Search for Holy... How do we do it?

name: Bugenhagen
line: Speak to the planet. Get the White Materia... This will bond the Planet to humans. Then speak to the planet. If our wish reaches the planet, the White Materia will begin to glow a pale green.

name: Cloud
line: ...This is the end. Aeris had the White Materia... But when Aeris died, it fell from the altar... That's why......this is the end.

name: Bugenhagen
line: Ho Ho Hooo!

name: Bugenhagen
line: Ho Ho Hooo!

name: Bugenhagen
line: Ho Ho Hooo! Look at this!

name: Bugenhagen
line: Ancients' writing.

name: Cloud
line: Can you read it?

name: Bugenhagen
line: I can't even make it out!!

name: Cloud
line: This's no time for jokes...

name: Bugenhagen
line: I'm not an Ancient. I can't read this thing!

name: Bugenhagen
line: I may be old, but my eyes aren't completely bad yet. Look closely below the writing.

name: Bugenhagen
line: It was probably written by a scientist who's been here... He probably used all his energy to make out these two words.

name: Cloud
line: Key......? To what?

name: Bugenhagen
line: I don't know... But, it probably has something to do with our riddle. The riddle...then it must have something to do with Aeris.

name: Cloud
line: So this note points to where the key is?

name: Bugenhagen
line: Probably... Use these words as clues and go find the key. I'll continue to figure out the Ancients' writing.

name: Cloud
line: A place (Even sunlight won't reach) is where the (key) is, right?

name: Bugenhagen
line: When you find the key, or when you can't go any further, come back here. Maybe I'll understand more from the writing and get some new information for you.

name: Bugenhagen
line: That Music Box over there. We'll put the key in it.

name: Bugenhagen
line: I'll go use the key. You all wait here. And watch closely what happens.

name: Bugenhagen
line: Ho Ho Hooo!

name: Bugenhagen
line: Now, go inside. Hope may be inside... Or......

name: Cloud
line: ...It's glowing.

name: Bugenhagen
line: Ho Ho Hooo!! It's pale green!!

name: Cloud
line: ...Aeris. Aeris has already prayed for Holy. ...After I gave up the Black Materia to Sephiroth...... Aeris' words came into my dreams... She said, she was the only one who could stop Sephiroth...... And to do that, there was a secret here... That was Holy...... That's why, she had the White Materia. Aeris knew about here... and what she had to do. Aeris has left us great hope. But, it cost her her life... her future...

name: Cloud
line:
I'm sorry...Aeris. I should have figured this out sooner.
...You left us without saying a word...... It was all so sudden, so I couldn't think... That's why it took so long for me to find out... But, Aeris...I understand now. Aeris... I'll do the rest.

name: Cloud
line: Thank you...Aeris.

name: Cloud
line: Aeris' voice has already reached the Planet. Just look at the glow of the White Materia. But......how about Holy? How come Holy isn't moving? Why?

name: Bugenhagen
line: Something's getting in its way.

name: Cloud
line: ......Him...... He's the only one that could do it. ...Sephiroth. Where are you?

name: Cloud
line: What the?

name: Cait Sith
line: whisper...whisper... (sorry I was a little surprised).

name: Cloud
line: What happened?

name: Cait Sith
line: You remember when the Junon Cannon disappeared? Actually, Rufus moved it.

name: Cloud
line: Moved it? That big thing......? Where...? Why?

name: Cait Sith
line: Rufus wants to destroy Sephiroth with it. That cannon operates on Huge Materia. But the Huge Materia has already been used in the Rocket Plan. So since the cannon's useless right now, he decided to move it. To a place where Materia... no, where Mako is gathered...

name: Cloud
line: And, where is that!?

name: Reeve
line: I see......

name: Scarlet
line: Hah, hah, hah! Don't worry about adjusting it, Reeve. Once you open it up all the way everything will go full speed!

name: Heidegger
line: Gya hah, hah, hah! The President's sure done it this time! If we can only defeat Sephiroth, the idea that Meteor will also disappear is based on different objectives!

name: Scarlet
line: Please remember, Mr. President... It was my idea to fire Mako reactor powered shells.

name: Rufus
line: Will the shells really reach the far northern border?

name: Scarlet
line: Ah, hah hah! Of course! But Mr. President, please do not call it a Mako cannon. This new weapon will be called...... The Sister Ray!

name: Cloud
line: Wh, what the...!?

name: Cid
line: What's wrong!?

name: Cid
line: From where?

name: Cait Sith
line: Wow!

name: Cait Sith
line: Hey!

name: Cait Sith
line: That was a surprise, the controls went crazy.

name: Cait Sith
line: This ain't good... Weapon came out of the sea and is heading straight for Midgar.

name: Cloud
line: The new weapon should stop him, right?

name: Cait Sith
line: I don't know if it's ready or not...

name: Barret
line: Hey! What's gonna happen to Marlene!?

name: Cait Sith
line: Doncha worry none, Marlene's in a safe place. She's with Aeris' mama.

name: Cait Sith
line: Barret!! What was that scratching just now!? As long as Marlene is safe, who cares what else happens, right?

name: Cait Sith
line: I been itchin' to say this to ya fer a while now! When ya blew the Midgar No. 1 up, how many folks d'ya think died?

name: Barret
line: ...that was for the life of the planet. Ya gotta expect a few casualties.

name: Cait Sith
line: A few? Whaddya mean 'a few'? What may be a few to y'all is everythin' to them who died......

name: Cait Sith
line: Protect the planet. Hah! Y'all sure sound good! Ain't no one that'd go against ya. So ya think ya can do whatever y'all want?

name: Barret
line: I don't wanna hear that from no one in Shinra...

name: Cait Sith
line: ......nuthin' I can do 'bout that...

name: Cloud
line: Stop it!

name: Tifa
line: Cait Sith...... Barret, he knows what he did. What we did in Midgar can't be forgotten no matter what the reason.

name: Tifa
line: Right? We haven't forgotten, right?

name: Tifa
line: I know you. You can't quit the company because you're worried about the people in Midgar, right?

name: Tifa
line: ......Cloud?

name: Cloud
line: OK! Let's go! We'll beat Weapon ourselves!

name: Cid
line: Hey Cloud...... You think we can win against that monster? We got a chance of winnin', right?

name: Cloud
line: How would I know? But that's no reason for us to just let him go! We're goin' to Midgar and fight Weapon! Come on, let's move!

name: Cloud
line: No, it's......feeling something. ......Yeah, it senses murder.

name: Scarlet
line: Hah, hah, hah! Anytime is fine.

name: Red XIII
line: Midgar!

name: Barret
line: Marlene!!

name: Barret
line: Damn...

name: Cloud
line: I see! They're after Sephiroth! The crater on the Northern boundary!

name: Cloud
line: Northern Cave... Let's go see what happened to it.

name: Cloud
line: Cid! Can the Airship get inside?

name: Cid
line: Huh? He's my student, ain't he!? Of course he can go anywhere!

name: Cloud
line: Right, sorry about that.

name: Barret
line: Yo, Cait Sith! Now what?

name: Cait Sith
line: Hold it!

name: Cait Sith
line: Scarlet! Heidegger! What's going on?

name: Reeve
line: Not the President. To Sister Ray!

name: Scarlet
line: Ha, ha, ha. What is it Reeve? You're speaking strangely.

name: Reeve
line: None of that matters! The reactor's output is increasing all by itself!

name: Scarlet
line: Ww, wait a minute. That's not wise! It must cool for 3 hours or it won't work. Reeve, shut off the machine!

name: Reeve
line: We can't do that! It's inoperable!

name: Reeve
line: What about the mainframe? Who!?

name: Reeve
line: Hey, call the mainframe!

name: Heidegger
line: Huh? Why are you giving orders?

name: Reeve
line: I don't give a damn about the details!!

name: Reeve
line: Hojo, STOP! The cannon, no, Midgar itself is in danger!

name: Hojo
line: Ha, ha, ha...... One or two Midgars? ...it's a small price to pay.

name: Reeve
line: Hojo! HOJO......!!

name: Hojo
line: Show me......Sephiroth. It should be near... Ha, ha, ha...... Go beyond the powers of science... Before your presence, science is powerless... I hate it, but I'll concede to it. Just...let me see it. Ha, ha, ha......

name: Cait Sith
line: We're sunk. Hojo's doing this on his own...... ...?...? H, huh!? I don't like this......

name: Barret
line: You're busted, Reeve! Too late tryin' to hide it now...

name: Cloud
line: Can't you stop the Mako reactor?

name: Cait Sith
line: ......We can't stop it.

name: Barret
line: You're from Shinra, ain't ya? So why's it impossible!?

name: Cid
line: We came a long way to get here. You better not double-cross us now!

name: Cait Sith
line: I can't make you trust me......

name: Cid
line: You damn fool! Don't you understand anything I'm saying? I don't give a damn about Shinra. If you're a man... no, if you're a human being, you'll save the planet! Don't you even care?

name: Cait Sith
line: No way! If we shut down the reactor, all hell will break loose!!

name: Cid
line: Why? Can't you just shut off the valve?

name: Cait Sith
line: Yeah, it's easy to shut off the reactor's pipe valves...... But the reactor made a path for the energy to escape from below. Once you open that, it'll be impossible to close it until everything blasts out... And we can't try to stop the energy from gushing out......

name: Barret
line: An explosion!!

name: Cait Sith
line: This blast'll be way stronger than when the number 1 reactor blew up!

name: Barret
line: Damn...!

name: Cait Sith
line: Forget about that.........the CANNON! We've got to get to Midgar! That's the first thing!!

name: Cloud
line: Must stop Hojo...first.

name: Reeve
line: That's a private matter......

name: Heidegger
line: The President is dead! Now I'm doing things my way! Ghaa haah hah hah!

name: Scarlet
line: Ha, ha, ha. Heidegger! Now I'm going to use the new weapon!

name: Reeve
line: Hey! Wait!!

name: Reeve
line: Cloud, everybody! Sorry...... But!!

name: Cloud
line: I know!

name: Cid
line: Hey! I'm leaving the ship in your hands!

name: Pilot
line: I'm heading for Midgar!

name: Barret
line: Even if we get there, Midgar's under martial law! There'll be no way we could slip into the slums.

name: Tifa
line: Looks like all transportation from the slums is cut off......

name: Cid
line: Hey, hey, whaddya think we have Highwind for? Where are we now!?

name: Barret
line: Huh? Where are we...?

name: Cid
line: If land's no go... We'll go by air!

name: Cloud
line: Okay then! We'll parachute into Midgar!!

name: Cloud
line: Here we go!!

name: Cait Sith
line: Please! Hurry and come to the Mako Cannon!

name: Elena
line: What are we going to do!? I think it's okay for you to ignore your orders now.

name: Reno
line: ...Elena, don't act so weak.

name: Rude
line: We're Turks, Elena.

name: Elena
line: ...Yes, sir. You're right.

name: Rude
line: Come on, we've got work to do.

name: Reno
line: I'm not really up for it, but...

name: Elena
line: Our orders were to seek you out and ... ...Kill. Our company may be in turmoil, but an order's an order. That's the will and spirit of the Turks! Believe it!

name: Heidegger
line: G'yaaa, Haaa, Haaa!!! Here they come!

name: Heidegger
line: G'yaaa, Haaa, Haaa!!! So they really showed up!

name: Heidegger
line: You sure did treat us like dogs up to now!!

name: Scarlet
line: You killed off a lot of my precious soldiers!

name: Heidegger
line: G'yaaa, Haaa, Haaa!!! But let's see how you do against anti-Weapon artillery!

name: Scarlet
line: You guys are worthless, but my proud creation is a sure thing!

name: Scarlet
line:
I'll show you the destructive power of the Proud Clod!
Boss immune to Gravity. Win Ragnarok.

name: Heidegger
line: Whoooooa!!

name: Barret
line: This is great. Hold on, Hojo......!

name: Hojo
line: Oh...the failure.

name: Cloud
line: At least remember my name! It's Cloud!

name: Hojo
line: Every time I see you, I... It pains me that I had so little scientific sense... I evaluated you as a failed project. But, you are the only one that succeeded as a Sephiroth-clone. Heh, heh, heh...... I'm even beginning to hate myself.

name: Cloud
line: None of that matters... just stop this nonsense!

name: Hojo
line: ...nonsense? Oh, this?

name: Hojo
line: Ha, ha, ha... Sephiroth seems to be counting on the energy. So I'm going to lend him a hand.

name: Cloud
line: Why!? Why do that!?

name: Hojo
line: Quit asking me why, you moron.

name: Hojo
line: Hmm...actually, you might be cut out to be a scientist.

name: Hojo
line: Energy level is at......83%. It's taking too long.

name: Hojo
line: My son is in need of power and help. ...That's the only reason.

name: Cloud
line: ...your son?

name: Hojo
line: Ha, ha, ha... Although he doesn't know.

name: Hojo
line: Ha, ha, ha... HA, HA, HA ...!! What will Sephiroth think when he finds out I'm his father? Always looking down on me like that. HA, HA, HA...!!

name: Cloud
line: Sephiroth is your son!?

name: Hojo
line: Ha, ha, ha... I offered the woman with my child to Professor Gast's Jenova Project. When Sephiroth was still in the womb, we took the cells of Jenova...

name: Hojo
line: HA, HA, HA!!

name: Cloud
line: I can't believe you're the one who did this... The illusionary crime against Sephiroth...

name: Hojo
line: Heee, hee, hee, hee! No you're wrong! It's my desire as a scientist! Heee, hee, hee, hee!

name: Hojo
line:
I...was defeated by my desire to become a scientist.
I lost the last time as well.

name: Hojo
line: I've injected Jenova's cells into my own body! Heee, hee, hee! Here are...... Heee, hee, hee! ...my results!!

name: Cloud
line: Meteor's gonna fall in about......

name: Red XIII
line: Seven more days. That's what Grandfather said.

name: Cloud
line: Red XIII...... You want to see everyone in Cosmo Canyon again?

name: Cloud
line: You want to see Marlene, right?

name: Barret
line: Don't ask me that.

name: Cloud
line: We'll beat Sephiroth... Then, if we don't release the power of Holy in seven days...... There won't be a planet left to protect.

name: Cloud
line: If we can't beat Sephiroth... It's as good as death for us. We'll just go a few days sooner than the rest who'll die from Meteor.

name: Barret
line: Don't be thinkin' you're gonna lose before ya even fight!

name: Cloud
line: No!

name: Cloud
line: What I meant was...

name: Cloud
line: What are we all fighting for? I want us all to understand that. Save the planet...for the future of the planet... Sure, that's all fine. But really, is that really how it is?

name: Cloud
line: For me, this is a personal feud. I want to beat Sephiroth. And settle my past. Saving the planet just happens to be part of that.

name: Cloud
line: I've been thinking.

name: Cloud
line: I think we all are fighting for ourselves. For ourselves...and that someone... something...whatever it is, that's important to us. That's what we're fighting for. That's why we keep up this battle for the planet.

name: Barret
line: You're right... It sounds cool sayin' it's to save the planet. But I was the one who blew up that Mako reactor...... Lookin' back on it now, I can see that wasn't the right way to do things. I made a lot of friends and innocent bystanders suffer...

name: Barret
line: ...At first, it was revenge against Shinra. For attackin' my town. But now...... Yeah. I'm fightin' for Marlene. For Marlene... For Marlene's future... Yeah...I guess I want to save the planet for Marlene's sake...

name: Cloud
line: Go and see her. Make sure you're right, and come back.

name: Cloud
line: All of you. Get off the ship and find out your reasons for yourselves. I want you to make sure. Then I want you to come back.

name: Cid
line: Maybe ain't none of us'll come back. Meteor's gonna kill us all anyway. Let's just forget any useless struggling!

name: Cloud
line: I know why I'm fighting. I'm fighting to save the planet, and that's that. But besides that, there's something personal too... A very personal memory that I have. What about you all?  I want all of you to find that something within yourselves. If you don't find it, then that's okay too. You can't fight without a reason, right? So, I won't hold it against you if you don't come back.

name: Cloud
line: What are you going to do, Tifa?

name: Tifa
line: Did you forget? I'm...all alone. I don't have anywhere to go.

name: Cloud
line: Yeah, we don't have anywhere or anyone to go home to.

name: Tifa
line: You're right...

name: Tifa
line: But...I'm sure someday... they'll come back, don't you think?

name: Cloud
line: Hmm... I wonder...? Everyone has an irreplaceable something they're holding on to... But this time, our opponent...

name: Tifa
line: Hmm...But that's all right, even if no one comes back. As long as I'm with you... As long as you're by my side... I won't give up even if I'm scared.

name: Tifa
line: No matter how close we are... We were far apart...before this. But when we were in the Lifestream surrounded by all those screams of anguish, I thought I heard your voice...

name: Tifa
line: ...sniff...you probably don't remember this... But deep in my heart I heard you calling my name... Or at least I thought I did...

name: Tifa
line: Cloud...? Do you think the stars can hear us? Do you think they see how hard we're fighting for them?

name: Cloud

name: Cloud

name: Tifa

name: Tifa
line: Give me a little longer... Just a little bit longer...

name: Tifa

name: Cloud
line: We'd better go.

name: Tifa

name: Cloud
line: It's all right, Tifa. You said so yourself yesterday. At least we don't have to go on alone.

name: Tifa

name: Cloud
line: Okay! Let's go!

name: Cloud

name: Cloud

name: Tifa
line: Huh!?

name: Cloud

name: Cloud

line: O, oh......is that okay with you?

name: Cloud

name: Tifa

name: Barret

name: Cait Sith

name: Cloud

line: We didn't come back for your spikey headed ass! We came back for Marlene. Guess it's jes' my......whatcha call, feelings or somethin'. I, uh I ain't got no words now......

name: Red XIII

name: Cid

name: Cloud
line: ......Aeris. She was smiling to the end. We have to do something, or that smile will just freeze like that.

name: Cloud
line: Let's all go together. Memories of Aeris...... Although she should've returned to the planet by now, something stopped her and now she's stuck......

name: Cloud

name: Cid

name: Cloud
line: This is our last battle. Our target is the North Cave. Our enemy is......Sephiroth!

name: Cloud

name: Cid

name: Cid

name: Cid

name: Cid
line: Geronimo!!

name: Cid

name: Cloud

name: Cloud

name: Cloud
line: All right, everyone, let's mosey.

name: Cid
line: Damn! Again! Stop sayin' it like a wimp! Can't you say 'Move out!' or somethin'?

name: Cloud

name: Barret

name: Red XIII

name: Barret

name: Cloud

name: Red XIII

name: Barret

name: Cloud
line: Later!

name: Cloud
line: Where are we...?

name: Cloud

name: Cloud
line: It's coming!!

name: Cloud

name: Barret

name: Cid
line: My...my body... I can't control my body...... Uuugh!?

name: Red XIII

name: Cait Sith

name: Tifa

name: Cloud
line: Ugh...ugh...

name: Cloud

name: Tifa
line: Cloud...?

name: Cloud

name: Tifa

name: Cloud
line: It's not over yet... This isn't the end yet!!

name: Cloud

name: Cloud

name: Cloud

name: Tifa
line: ...You're right. We've done all that we could do.

name: Cloud
line: All right, everyone. It's no use thinking about it. We'll leave all our worries here. Let's go home proud.

name: Tifa

name: Cloud
line: ......I feel it...

name: Tifa

name: Cloud

name: Cloud
line: Still......

name: Tifa

name: Cloud
line: He's...laughing...

name: Tifa
line: Cloud!

name: Cloud
line: ........Lifestream?

name: Cloud

name: Tifa

name: Tifa

name: Cloud
line: Hey, where is everyone?

name: Barret
line: Heeeey!

name: Tifa
line: I'm glad you're all safe!

name: Barret

name: Barret

name: Cid
line: Shit!!

line: The flower girl?

name: Barret

name: Cait Sith
line: I had everyone take refuge in the slums, but the way things are now...

name: Red XIII
line: It's too late for Holy. Meteor is approaching the Planet. Holy is having the opposite effect. Forget Midgar, we've gotta worry about the Planet.

name: Tifa
line: What's that!?

line: .......Lifestream.

name: Guard
line: But, uh, I......

line: Don't be taken in by the Shinra. Mako energy will not last forever. Mako is the life of the Planet and that life is finite. The end is coming. Saviors of the Planet

name: Cloud
line: Geez, you stand out even more than I do...

name: Cloud
line: Don't mess with me. I used to be in SOLDIER. I'll tell you how much I know... an' for free too!

name: Cloud
line: What do you want to know?

name: Cloud
line: You've got to hang in there. You're limit gauge is just starting to build.

name: Cloud
line: Ok! Now your limit gauge is full, go ahead and use it! Fight with your limit technique.

name: Cloud
line: Great!

name: Cloud
line: Calm down! When your enemy uses magic counter with [Magic Barrier] or [reflect]. [Magic Barrier] reduces the damage received from magic by half. [reflect] bounces the attacks off you. But the number of times you can use it is limited so be careful.

name: Cloud
line: Great!

name: Cloud
line: If you want to get as strong as me you need to use Materia. And you have to find the best combinations of them. The type of Materia you put in your weapons and armor will determine how quickly your Materia grows. Put Materia into the open slots in your weapons and armor. The possible combinations are limitless. That's about all I can tell you. If you want to be like me, you have to have some natural talent.

name: Cloud
line: Listen kid, don't piss me off! That's all right. Just give it a try. Little by little, you'll get used to it.

name: Cloud
line: I'm not hard up enough to take money from guys like you. But I'll rap with you for a while.

name: Cloud
line: What do you want to know?

line: What're you, r******d?[note 1] Midgar's under martial law now!

name: Guard

name: Guard
line: Hell no!! But in case you forgot, we're in the middle of a slum. They could be anywhere around, so stay on your guard.

name: Guard

name: Guard

line: You probably just found it lying around somewhere, right?

name: Cloud
line: ...What kind of price is that?

line: Don't want no money. AVALANCHE ain't no packa criminals. We jes want back what your boss stole from us. I mean, "who" he stole from us.

name: Cashier

line: With things the way they are now, how 'bout raising a Chocobo? No, I'm not trying to persuade you for money. It's just because of the state of things in the world. I thought that it would be a good and healthy thing for you to raise some Chocobos...

name: Choco Bill
line: Hmm...You just happen to be in luck! It just so happens that we aren't taking care of any Chocobos for anyone else, so... I could take care of 6 Chocobos right now, for 10000 gil per Chocobo. How 'bout it?

name: Chole

name: Chole
line: Wow, that's amazing! ...let me take some notes.

name: Chole
line: Wow, that's amazing! ...let me take some notes.

name: Cloud

name: Red XIII
line: I can't leave you like this, grandfather...! It's the duty of my... Seto's son, to guard this canyon and her people...

name: Bugenhagen
line: ...listen, Nanaki. I think you may already know. If you have any mission in life, it is not to defend this valley. Look at the withering mountain grass. Listen to the warble of the new born chocobo's. Look always to the eternal flow of time which is far greater than the span of a human life. It will teach you more, than staying here in the valley...

name: Bugenhagen
line: What you will see will eventually become a part of life's dream. For my children...... And for your children...... So please, Nanaki... Go with Cloud... And with your eyes...your ears...

name: Bugenhagen
line: Ho Ho.......Hoooo. Now, now. Don't look like that. I'm all right. It's a wide world and you must go out and see it... You may even find your life's mate. You never know.

name: Red XIII
line: Grandfather......

name: Bugenhagen
line: Oh yes...take this along. I think it will look good on you now. Ho Ho......

name: Cloud
line: Red XIII... Is Bugenhagen...?

line: Grandpa told me that he's going away again!

name: Cloud
line: Away...?

name: Red XIII
line: It seems like he really liked that Airship. He told me he couldn't stay still and just zipped out of here! He even gave me a gift, look!

name: Red XIII

name: Cloud

name: Red XIII

name: Vincent
line: ...Never seen you before. You must leave.

name: Vincent

name: Vincent
line: ...He was missing, but has just recently reappeared. He has taken many lives and is seeking the Promised Land.

name: Party leader
line: Now it's your turn.

name: Vincent
line: Sorry...I cannot speak.

name: Vincent
line: Hearing your stories, has added upon me yet another sin. More nightmares shall come to me now, more than I previously had. Now...please leave.

name: Vincent
line: I was with...the Shinra Manufacturing Department in Administrative Research, otherwise known as--the Turks...

name: Vincent
line: Formerly of the Turks. I have no affiliation with Shinra now.

name: Vincent
line: ...And you?

name: Vincent
line: The woman who gave birth to Sephiroth.

name: Vincent
line: That isn't completely wrong, but just a theory. He was born from a beautiful lady. That lady was Lucrecia. She was an assistant to Professor Gast of the Jenova Project. Beautiful...Lucrecia.

name: Party leader
line: ...A human experiment?

name: Vincent
line: There was no way to cancel the experiment. I couldn't stop her. That was my sin. I let the one I loved, the one I respected most, face the worst.

name: Vincent
line: Lucrecia...

name: Vincent

name: Vincent

name: Cloud
line: ...All the different noise.

name: Cloud

name: Cloud
line: It seems to mean something... but I can't quite get it. I hate not knowing what it is. That's what this is similar to.

name: Cloud
line: So Aeris came here too... She stood in this exact spot...

name: Cloud
line: Hmm... Aeris didn't have to come here. She was able to find out all the information here. What Aeris needed was that altar...and only that.

name: Cloud
line: Aeris...... Aeris... What were you planning to do?

name: Cloud

line: Who are you?

name: Chocobo Sage
line: I don't know.

name: Chocobo Sage
line: Oh yeah!! They used to call me the 'Chocobo Sage'. That's right!! Right, that was it, The Chocobo Sage!!

line: Uh, oh. I'm......

name: Zack
line: Yep...gotta change my plans!

name: Zack

name: Zack
line: ...Hey, wanna start a business? But what could we do?

name: Zack

name: Zack
line: HEY! Of course! I got a lot of brains and skill that other guys don't! That settles it! I'm gonna become a mercenary!

name: Zack
line: Yeah! Thanks pops!

name: Zack
line: Listen, I'm gonna become a mercenary and that's that. Boring stuff, dangerous stuff, anything for money. I'm gonna be rich!

name: Zack
line: So, Cloud? What are YOU gonna do?

name: Zack
line: Just kidding... I won't leave you hanging like that.

name: Zack
line: ...We're friends, right? Mercenaries, Cloud. That's what you an' me are gonna be. Understand, Cloud?

line: ...Ah...ughhhh......

line: Vincent......?

line: Stay back!!

name: Vincent
line: I'm against it!! Why experiments on humans!?

name: Gast
line: She and I are both scientists!!

name: Vincent
line: After that, a child was born to Lucrecia... That child's name is... Sephiroth......

name: Vincent
line: Urrrrrrrrgh!!

name: Vincent
line: This body is... the punishment that's been given to me... I was unable...... to stop Professor Gast and Hojo... And Lucrecia... I was unable to stop them... All that I was able to do was watch... That is my punishment...

name: Lucrecia
line: I wanted to disappear... I couldn't be with anyone... I wanted to die... But the Jenova inside me wouldn't let me die...

name: Lucrecia
line: Lately, I dream a lot of Sephiroth... My dear, dear child. Ever since he was born I never got to hold him, even once... Not even once. You can't call me his mother... That...is my sin...

name: Lucrecia
line: Back!! Stay back!

name: Lucrecia
line: Vincent... Won't you please tell me?

name: Lucrecia
line: If Sephiroth is still alive? I heard that he died five years ago. But I see him in my dreams so often... And I know that physically, like myself, he can't die so easily. Please, Vincent tell me......

name: Vincent
line: Lucrecia... Sephiroth is dead...

name: Rude
line: ...again?

line: We just seem to keep running into each other lately!

name: Reno
line: There were weapons and Materia developed solely to destroy Sephiroth.

name: Rude
line: ...but, it was attacked by Weapon and sunk to the bottom of the sea.

name: Reno
line: I can't give you what's here. We'll take out Sephiroth. I guess this is our last meeting.

name: Rude
